title: Short fade
summary: A simple brief for short top and mid fade.
steps: Ask for a short top.
Ask for a mid fade on the sides.
Keep the top lightly textured.

title: Short fade — show-to-barber brief
summary: A ready modern short haircut instruction.
steps: Top: short but not buzzed, with light scissor texture.
Sides: mid fade with a clean blend and no hard line.
Back: matched to the sides and naturally blended.
Fringe: short, not heavy on the forehead.
Styling: matte and natural, not wet-look.
Please show me the top length before taking it shorter.
dontDo: do not ask only for short sides
do not skip the fade level

title: Classic formal haircut
summary: A tidy instruction for a formal look.
steps: Ask for a classic work-friendly cut.
Keep sides short but not aggressive.
Leave the top easy to comb and style.
warnings: Say whether you want a part and on which side.

title: Formal style — show-to-barber brief
summary: A polished brief without harsh contrast.
steps: I want a classic, tidy cut for work and meetings.
Top: leave enough length to comb, without heavy thinning.
Sides: shorten evenly with a soft blend, no aggressive fade.
Back: natural shape with a clean neckline.
Texture: moderate, controlled and neat.
Styling: light paste or cream with a natural finish.
dontDo: do not choose harsh contrast for a formal look
do not omit the parting preference

title: Natural medium length
summary: A brief for a relaxed everyday style.
steps: Keep the top medium length.
Shorten the sides softly, without a hard fade.
Make the whole haircut look natural.
warnings: Say how much length should stay on top.

title: Natural medium style
summary: A daily haircut brief that does not require heavy styling.
steps: Top: keep medium length and clean up the shape.
Sides: shorten enough to stop bulk, without strong fade.
Blend: soft taper or natural connection with the top.
Fringe: keep movement, avoid a ruler-straight line.
Texture: light, so the hair can move naturally.
Styling: minimal, preferably cream or light paste.
dontDo: do not use a sharp fade for a natural result
do not cut the whole top evenly with clippers

title: Shape for curly hair
summary: A brief that keeps curl and volume.
steps: Do not cut the curls too short.
Shape the sides and remove excess bulk.
Keep the natural curl pattern.
warnings: Curly hair often looks shorter after drying.

title: Curly hair — show-to-barber brief
summary: A brief that protects length and natural curl.
steps: Top: keep curl and volume, cut carefully.
Sides: shape the haircut without forcing it flat.
Blend: soft, with no hard separation from the top.
Fringe: leave controlled length if it falls forward.
Texture: avoid aggressive thinning that creates frizz.
Styling: curl cream or light product without stiffness.
dontDo: do not cut curls like straight hair
do not thin heavily without agreement

title: Textured fringe
summary: A short brief for a modern relaxed top.
steps: Keep texture on top.
Make the fringe slightly broken up.
Keep sides shorter but not extreme.
warnings: Say whether the fringe should fall forward or be lifted.

title: Textured fringe — instruction
summary: A modern option with controlled movement at the front.
steps: Top: keep enough length for texture and movement.
Fringe: textured, not a straight blunt line.
Sides: shorter with soft or medium blend.
Back: clean and matched to the sides.
Styling: matte paste, relaxed finish.
Please check fringe length before the final shortening.
dontDo: do not cut the fringe too straight
do not shorten the front without checking length

title: Soft taper
summary: A safe shorter-side option without strong fade.
steps: Ask for a soft taper around temples and neckline.
Avoid strong contrast.
Only clean up the top.
warnings: Good choice when you do not want a radical change.

title: Soft taper — show-to-barber brief
summary: Clean and natural sides and neckline.
steps: Temples: soft taper with a gentle blend.
Neckline: clean but natural, not high fade.
Top: keep current length and improve shape.
Sides: shorten only enough to freshen the haircut.
Lines: natural, not overly sharp.
Styling: light and daily.
dontDo: do not make a high fade
do not change top shape without asking

title: Keep the length
summary: A brief for a cleanup without a big change.
steps: Please keep the length.
Only remove excess bulk and ends.
Do not change the overall shape.
warnings: Show the maximum length to cut with your fingers.

title: Refresh without big change
summary: A visit brief when the haircut should look better, not shorter.
steps: Goal: refresh the haircut, not make a large change.
Top: keep the length, trim only the ends.
Sides: clean up bulky areas without heavy shortening.
Blend: natural, with no visible disconnect.
Fringe: keep current styling direction.
Please show the result before additional shortening.
dontDo: do not say just as usual if the barber does not know you
do not allow a big change without confirmation

title: Simple barber brief
summary: A universal instruction before the haircut.
steps: Say how much to keep on top.
Define side length.
Add whether the style should be natural or formal.

title: Universal haircut brief
summary: A complete instruction that reduces chair-side confusion.
steps: Top: [length to keep] and [texture preference].
Sides: [short/medium/keep] with [low/mid/soft/no fade].
Fringe: [none/short/keep/textured].
Back: clean and matched to sides.
Style: [natural/formal/modern].
Before taking it much shorter, please show me the length.
dontDo: do not rely on a photo only
do not leave key choices unexplained
